subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-28 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Until an army enters the field of battle, the extent of the sovereign's loving-kindness and affection toward it remaineth unknown. Those soldiers who abide in their homelands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لشگر تا در میدان حرب نباشد معلوم نیست که چقدر پادشاه به آن مهربانی و محبت دارد.  عساکری که در اوطانشان هستند
subcodes.subjects: @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the power of example, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
